headline: Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen says he will step down after company installs successor
summary: Shantanu Narayen led Adobe through a transition to subscription software, and he's been positioning the company to grow in the artificial intelligence age.

raw.headline: Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen says he will step down after company installs successor
